details: All 5 tasks present in sprint.md, tasks.md, task.json, sprint.json: E1, E2, T1, G1, V1
Each task has: title, status (TODO/open), description (tasks.md §Description), file_targets (task.json), tests (tasks.md §Done when + task.json tests[]), estimate, depends_on
sprint.md L12 references acceptance rows CB, CC, CD

CB.coverage: V1 covers PAT regen + env update + container recreate + manual Sync now + sync status check + entity count verification + no 401 in error_message
CB.notes: CB requires operator BACKEND_DEPLOY gate before V1 can execute — correctly sequenced in deploy_order

CC.coverage: E1 adds unauthorized variant + frozen Display message; E2 matches 401 in request(); T1 wiremock test asserts variant; G1 runs regression — full automated chain covers user-facing diagnosis
CC.notes: Display message frozen at GATE-MESSAGE-1 level, propagated via e.to_string() in sync/mod.rs L254 (no code change needed in sync/mod.rs)

CD.with_test_coverage: T1 (automated) verifies 401->Unauthorized mapping; V1 (operator) verifies >=3 scheduled syncs succeed post-PAT regen — both layers present
CD.notes: CD is an operator-only temporal requirement (monitor multiple sync cycles) — T1 provides the automated regression anchor

orphan_check.notes: No orphan tasks. E1->CC (variant+Display), E2->CC (match arm), T1->CC+CD (wiremock test + regression anchor), G1->CB+CC+CD (regression gates all), V1->CB+CD (ops smoke)

GATE-ERROR-1.coverage: E1 adds Unauthorized variant; E2 uses it in match arm
GATE-ERROR-1.constraint_check: task.json frozen_boundaries: 'Unauthorized is unit variant (no fields)' — correct

GATE-MESSAGE-1.coverage: E1 Display impl frozen per task.json + tasks.md + architecture.md
GATE-MESSAGE-1.constraint_check: Display: 'firefly_personal_access_token invalid or expired — regenerate in Firefly profile → API tokens → update FIREFLY_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN' — matches architecture.md L2830

GATE-TEST-1.coverage: T1 wiremock 401 test + preserve existing PAT-empty behavior
GATE-TEST-1.constraint_check: tasks.md T1: 'Preserve existing PersonalAccessTokenMissing test' — noted
GATE-TEST-1.note: Existing firefly_integration.rs has no explicit PAT-missing test in current file (only sync_issues_only_get_requests_to_firefly). The pat_configured() check in sync/mod.rs L209 is unit-level. T1 should add new 401 test without breaking existing integration test.

GATE-DEC-1.coverage: No new DEC required — implementation detail per architecture.md L2812
GATE-DEC-1.constraint_check: sprint.md L88: 'GATE-DEC-1 ✅ closed — No new DEC (implementation detail)'

GATE-PREFLIGHT-1.constraint_check: Architecture § BUG-0027 L2832: 'GATE-PREFLIGHT-1 ❌ Deferred — Startup health probe deferred to future US' — matches sprint.md

GATE-302-HANDLING.coverage: Closed — no handling needed (Accept: application/json always sent at firefly/mod.rs L133)
GATE-302-HANDLING.constraint_check: architecture.md L2704 confirms Firefly returns 401 JSON when Accept: application/json is sent

firefly_mod_variant_location_L20_37.actual_lines: L19-37: #[derive(Debug, thiserror::Error)] pub enum FireflyError { ... } — 6 variants: MethodNotAllowed, PathNotAllowed, Http, InvalidUrl, Db, UnexpectedStatus, PersonalAccessTokenMissing
firefly_mod_variant_location_L20_37.note: Unauthorized goes after PersonalAccessTokenMissing (L36-37) or between variants — line range L20-37 is accurate for the enum definition

firefly_mod_request_L128_158.actual_lines: L128: 'for attempt in 0..=max_retries' retry loop; L137: status extraction; L148-150: is_success return; L152-156: server error/429 retry; L158: 'return Err(FireflyError::UnexpectedStatus(status))'
firefly_mod_request_L128_158.note: 401 match arm should be inserted BEFORE L158 (the UnexpectedStatus fallthrough) — likely between L156 and L158. Line range L128-158 is accurate for the request method's status handling.

firefly_integration_exists_and_uses_wire.actual: backend/tests/firefly_integration.rs exists, imports wiremock::{Mock, MockServer, ResponseTemplate}, uses MockServer::start(), Mock::given(...).respond_with(...).mount(&mock). Pattern is well-established for T1 to follow.
firefly_integration_exists_and_uses_wire.note: Existing test requires DATABASE_URL (via setup_db()) — T1 wiremock test will need same infra. Test uses test_config() with FireflyConfig{personal_access_token: 'test-pat'}, FireflyClient constructed from config. Pattern directly reusable for 401 mock test.

sync_mod_error_propagation.note: FireflyError::Unauthorized.to_string() will yield the Display message → error_message column in sync_runs. No code change needed in sync/mod.rs. Confirmed: e.to_string() propagation captures new variant automatically.

allowed_paths_check.note: firefly/mod.rs L10-17 ALLOWED_PATHS includes /api/v1/accounts. T1 wiremock test should mock /api/v1/accounts (NOT /api/v1/about which is not in ALLOWED_PATHS). Task T1 description in task.json specifies /api/v1/about — this would hit PathNotAllowed before HTTP. Recommend T1 use /api/v1/accounts as the mock path to exercise the actual 401 flow.
allowed_paths_check.action: Note for execute phase: T1 implementation should use /api/v1/accounts (or another ALLOWED_PATHS entry) rather than /api/v1/about for the wiremock mock

t1_plan.notes: Existing firefly_integration.rs test infrastructure directly supports wiremock 401 test. MockServer start -> Mock::given(method('GET')).and(path('/api/v1/accounts')).and(header('Authorization', 'Bearer test-pat')).respond_with(ResponseTemplate::new(401)). FireflyClient constructed -> call get_paginated('/api/v1/accounts', &[]) -> assert matches Err(FireflyError::Unauthorized).
t1_plan.constraint: DATABASE_URL env var required (existing infrastructure constraint — graceful skip when absent, same as existing test)

g1_regression.cargo_test_sync_tests: runnable — unit tests in sync::tests module (no DB needed)

execute_phase_guidance.path_correction_for_t1: Use /api/v1/accounts (in ALLOWED_PATHS) instead of /api/v1/about (NOT in ALLOWED_PATHS) for wiremock 401 mock path
execute_phase_guidance.operator_gate_before_v1: BACKEND_DEPLOY (rebuild container so new Unauthorized variant is live)
